category_sources: source_facts.description says osmium-tool is a Libosmium-based command-line tool for processing OpenStreetMap data; official Osmium Tool Manual describes a versatile CLI for working with OSM data.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide osmium-tool; official osmcode.org page and GitHub repository use Osmium Tool/osmium-tool.
docs_sources: Official osmcode.org Osmium Tool Manual provides introduction and use cases; docs.osmcode.org hosts latest osmium manual pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/osmcode/osmium-tool; per instruction repo was not redetermined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable identify a Libosmium-based CLI; official manual describes OSM data processing, conversion, extracts, tag filtering, sorting, and change-file work.
